backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.2.0 to 4.0.2 to align with JDK 21 support and new framework features.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Change the Maven group ID from com.ems to com.example.backend.
Rename the Maven artifact ID from energy-management-system to Energy.
Change the project version from 1.0.0 to 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.
Rename the project name from Energy Management System to Energy.
Update the project description text.
Add empty license, developer, and SCM metadata sections to the POM.
Remove JWT library dependencies (jjwt-api, jjwt-impl, jjwt-jackson) and associated property.
Remove MySQL and H2 database driver dependencies.
Remove Lombok dependency and its annotation processor configuration.
Remove MapStruct dependency and its annotation processor configuration.
Remove SpringDoc OpenAPI/Swagger dependency.
Remove Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency.
Remove Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency.
Remove Spring Boot Starter WebSocket dependency.
Remove Spring Boot Starter Mail dependency.
Replace spring-boot-starter-web with spring-boot-starter-webmvc.
Replace generic test starters with specific security and webmvc test starters.
Remove explicit maven-compiler-plugin configuration, relying on Spring Boot parent defaults for JDK 21.
Remove explicit excludes from spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration.

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script from version 3.2.0 to 3.3.4 to align with newer Maven distribution standards.
Refactor the shell script to use modern POSIX-compliant practices, including strict error handling and cleaner variable expansion.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Added 'set -euf' and replaced legacy variable checks with modern parameter expansion like '${VAR-}'

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Streamline OS-specific path handling by removing complex legacy logic for Gentoo, Solaris, and older macOS Java home detection.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Replaced large case statement for OS detection with simplified Cygwin/MinGW path conversion logic

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Encapsulate Java home and command resolution into a dedicated function with improved error reporting.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Created 'set_java_home' function that sets JAVACMD and JAVACCMD with explicit existence checks

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Introduce a shell-based string hashing function to generate unique directory names for Maven distributions.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Added 'hash_string' function implementing Java-like String::hashCode algorithm

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Implement a structured verbose logging mechanism controlled by the MVNW_VERBOSE environment variable.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Added 'verbose' function and updated log calls to use it conditionally

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Add a utility function to trim whitespace and carriage returns from property values for robust parsing.
Refactor property parsing to read distributionUrl and distributionSha256Sum from maven-wrapper.properties at startup.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Added loop to read 'distributionUrl' and 'distributionSha256Sum' from .mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Add support for downloading and running the Maven Daemon (mvnd) as an alternative to standard Maven.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Added logic to detect 'maven-mvnd' in distributionUrl and set MVN_CMD=mvnd.sh

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Switch from downloading a wrapper JAR to downloading the full Maven distribution archive (zip/tar.gz).
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Replaced wrapper JAR download logic with logic to download distributionUrl to a temp directory

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Update checksum validation to verify the SHA-256 of the downloaded Maven distribution archive instead of the wrapper JAR.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Changed validation target from wrapperJarPath to TMP_DOWNLOAD_DIR/$distributionUrlName

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Implement logic to extract the downloaded Maven distribution archive using unzip or tar.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Added conditional block to run 'unzip' or 'tar xzf' on the downloaded archive

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Calculate a unique MAVEN_HOME path based on the distribution URL hash to allow multiple versions to coexist.
Ensure temporary download directories are cleaned up after installation using a trap.
backend/mvnw.human_impl: Added 'trap clean HUP INT TERM EXIT' and 'clean' function to remove TMP_DOWNLOAD_DIR

backend/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Replace the legacy batch-only Maven Wrapper script with the modern hybrid batch/Powershell script from version 3.3.4 to support newer Maven features and cross-platform consistency.
backend/mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Replaced content of mvnw.cmd with version 3.3.4 template including Powershell fallback logic.

backend/src/main/resources/application.p.general_idea: Replaced the comprehensive application configuration with a single property defining the application name.
backend/src/main/resources/application.p.human_impl: Replaced 50 lines of server, database, JWT, and logging properties with `spring.application.name=Energy`

backend/target/classes/application.prope.general_idea: The application name was changed to a shorter, simpler string.
Server port and context path configuration were removed.
H2 database connection and JPA configuration were removed.
JWT secret and expiration settings were removed.
CORS allowed origins and methods configuration were removed.
Multipart file size limits were removed.
Logging levels and console pattern configuration were removed.
Spring Boot Actuator endpoint exposure settings were removed.
SpringDoc OpenAPI/Swagger path and sorting configuration were removed.
